chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.D-15 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.03.2019 Mr. Shahzad Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for the applicant submits that the detainee has surfaced, as such, he does not press this application, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
